sentences.text: Thank you for calling American community management all incoming and outgoing calls may be monitored for quality control and training purposes. Many of your calls can be answered by logging into the portal at W W W dot E C M home dot. Com. Please listen to this entire message before making a selection. If you are a realtor or an agent in need of a resale or refinance documents. These documents must be ordered on home wise docks dot. Com H O N E W I S E D O C S dot. Com. If you are calling regarding the recent bank change and have a question or need assistance. Please press two. If you are calling with a general question need assistance with the community portal page assistance with an architectural request need a copy of an insurance policy or to report any issue or concern please press three. If you are a board member or vendor and know your party's extension please dial it now to hear these options again please press eight. Many of your questions can be answered by logging into your associations portal page by at W W W dot E C M home dot. Com your call is important to us please remain on the line for the next available representative.

conversation.title: Call: Jordan Culp and Heather Griffing @ American Community Management
